content_body:
At Cabin Rentals of Georgia, our cabins are a great way to escape and have the ultimate Blue Ridge experience. We take pride in striving to make sure you have a one-of-a-kind stay in our cabins. Here are five things that we believe set us apart from other vacation rental companies:

1.    NO HIDDEN FEES

Many cabins in the Blue Ridge area are loaded with extra fees that seem to come out of nowhere when you go through the reservation process. We are a company that does not charge for you to bypass our office and check in directly at your cabin or charge you for concierge services.  We do not lump together a bunch of fees that you may have no use for or need, such as after-hours emergency service or free lock-out visits. We line our charge items out so you see exactly what you are paying for. Simple and to the point is key in providing the satisfaction of our guests’ needs.

2.  EACH CABIN IS AN EXPERIENCE IN ITSELF

There are certain standards we have for the "perfect" cabin, and views are a priority.  Each of our Blue Ridge cabins has either some kind of water view or frontage and mountain view. We make sure our cabins have special amenities so that you and your family/friends can enjoy being together. Porch life is a way of life in Blue Ridge, and how relaxing it is to feel a million miles away while basking in North Georgia's beauty. Some porches with gorgeous views could tell many a story of past guests who have shared life's special moments with the Blue Ridge mountain vista as a backdrop. 

3. WIDE SELECTION OF CABINS

Whether you want a romantic getaway, a Blue Ridge mountain adventure for the entire family, or a couples retreat, girls' weekend getaway, family reunion, or business retreat, we have every type of selection imaginable to fit your needs. Our 2-bedroom cabins are perfect for a romantic getaway with your sweetheart, and our 5-bedroom cabins with bathrooms in every bedroom will comfortably accommodate the needs of your large family or group.

4. CLEANLINESS

Cabin Rentals of Georgia trains all of our housekeepers so that they pass the white glove test after each clean. We train them in beautiful presentation of beds, sofas, and living spaces so that everything is beautiful upon arrival. We strive for excellence in maintaining our beautiful Blue Ridge cabins so that you do not have to worry about anything but discovering fun things to do in a very special Blue Ridge cabin.

5. CONVENIENCE TO NORTH GEORGIA MOUNTAIN ACTIVITIES

All of our North Georgia cabins are located in prime locations convenient for the area's special activities. For example, if you stay in any of the Toccoa River cabins, you're very close to the Ocoee Whitewater Center for whitewater rafting and conveniently located between Blue Ridge and McCasyville. If you stay in any of our Aska Adventure Area cabins, you are in the center of hiking paths, canoeing/rafting/kayaking on the Toccoa River, and mountain biking.  Many of our cabins are in close proximity to Historic Downtown Blue Ridge for shopping, restaurants, galleries, and festivals. Some of our cabins sit on acreage ranging from 9-30 acres, and the adventure is in the exploration of the beautiful mountain surroundings.

Now that you have discovered the 5 things that set our cabins in the Blue Ridge Mountains apart from the others, we hope you will stay with us!  Our selection, amenities, and customer service will convince you that staying with Cabin Rentals of Georgia is a must for your vacation needs. We would love for you to have a 5-star Blue Ridge experience!
title: 5 Unique Things to Know About our Cabin Rentals
